description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular chassis with heavy armor plating covering the majority of its body. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent, forward-mounted cannon on a turret, suggesting offensive capabilities. Its sides are shielded by large, sloped panels, likely designed for deflection and additional protection, with one side displaying blue accent panels and ventilation grilles. The vehicle moves on wide, reinforced treads, providing stability and traction on urban terrain. The cockpit or command module is centrally located and appears heavily armored, with a narrow, angular viewport. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and urban combat readiness.
description: Heavily armored, angular combat vehicle with a forward-mounted cannon and reinforced treads, featuring blue accent panels and sloped side armor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular, armored cockpit flanked by large, sloped side panels and the central cannon mount.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long cannon, sloped black armor, and the continuous tread system.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the armored cockpit and the exhaust or vent structures on either side.
description_view_3: Right side view displays blue accent panels with ventilation grilles and the full length of the cannon and treads.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor panels on the sides and front; reinforced cockpit and side panels with angular, modular design.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color scheme with black, gray, and blue panels; no camouflage pattern visible.
